chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1531 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.6738/25. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A No.6065/25. 4. For hearing of main case. 15.09.2025. Ms. Saiqa Ansari, Advocate for Petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Counsel present for Petitioner submits that the Respondents / Sindh Public Service Commission vide advertisement No.01/2023 initiated the recruitment process for the post of Assistant Director (Legal) BPS-17. Petitioner meeting all eligibility criteria applied for the said post; however, the Respondents through rejection letter dated 22.01.20241 rejected the candidature of Petitioner. Learned Counsel for Petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Petition by requesting that 2nd Appeal under Rule 161 of RMR-2023 is pending before Respondent No.3 / Chairman Sindh Public Service Commission, Thandi Sarak Hyderabad and the Respondent No.3 may be directed to decide the Petitioner’s 2nd Appeal expeditiously on merits in accordance with Rules. Learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court in other matters has waived notice of instant Petition and submits that if another Appeal has been preferred and pending before Respondent No.3, it shall be adjudicated on merits after affording the petitioner an opportunity to be heard. In view of the foregoing, the instant Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.3 / competent authority to decide the Petitioner’s pending Appeal by an speaking order within Ten days in accordance with law and after granting the Petitioner a fair opportunity of hearing.

Learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court in other matters has waived notice of instant Petition and submits that if another Appeal has been preferred and pending before Respondent No.3, it shall be adjudicated on merits after affording the petitioner an opportunity to be heard. In view of the foregoing, the instant Petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.3 / competent authority to decide the Petitioner’s pending Appeal by an speaking order within Ten days in accordance with law and after granting the Petitioner a fair opportunity of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Ali. 1 Available at page#59 Annexure-E.
